productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Black Beach Flip Flops
description: This stylish pair of flip flops from puma offers comfort at its best. The beachy design on the footbed and the velvety straps is reminiscent of a walk along the ocean shores. With circular grooves on the outsole offering an absolutely grippy stability, it makes for great pool and beachwear.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and styleVelvety straps for soft, comfort and stylish feelMidsoleSoft, cushioned EVA footbed for step-in comfortFloral prints on the footbed for styleOutsoleTPR outsole with circular suction lugs for grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
